description: Sprint 1 test corpus for the Audio-Type Classifier. Each entry has a ground-truth type label (A-F) for validation. Types are defined in project_audio_type_taxonomy memory.

type_definitions.A: Solo monologue (one speaker, continuous speech, light/no music)
type_definitions.B: Compilation w/ epic music (multi-speaker cuts, heavy orchestral)
type_definitions.C: Cinematic tribute (character clips + dominating music + SFX)
type_definitions.F: Sports / pre-game (high-energy, short punchy, crowd noise)

audios.notes: Jocko's famous 'Good' speech. Solo monologue, calm-then-intense delivery.
Standard YouTube motivational compilation w/ epic music.
Same channel style as B1. Multiple speakers + epic score.
Jon Snow King in the North scene tribute.

audios.notes: Original soundtrack for GoT (background music for many tributes). Borderline C (mostly music, some dialogue layered).
Sopranos dialogue scene. Conversational, no music.
Dialogue scene between two characters, some ambient music.

gaps.E: Need 2-3 spiritual/religious audios (Joel Osteen, Steven Furtick, etc.)
gaps.F: Need 2-3 sports/pre-game speeches (Inky Johnson, locker-room montages)
gaps.A_extra: Could use 1 more Type A solo monologue (Tony Robbins, Goggins, Hormozi)
gaps.D_extra: Could use 1-2 real podcast clips (Chris Williamson, Lex Fridman, Joe Rogan)
